nasb.text: “You shall make a breastpiece of judgment, the work of a skillful workman; like the work of the ephod you shall make it: of gold, of blue and purple and scarlet material and fine twisted linen you shall make it.

esv.text: “You shall make a breastpiece of judgment, in skilled work. In the style of the ephod you shall make it—of gold, blue and purple and scarlet yarns, and fine twined linen shall you make it.

cnv.text: “你要用巧工做一個作判斷用的胸牌，像以弗得的做法一樣，要用金線、藍色紫色朱紅色線和撚的細麻做成。

ccb.text: “要精心制作一个用来明白上帝旨意的胸牌，制作的方法和造以弗得一样，用金线和细麻线及蓝色、紫色、朱红色的线制作。
